SEARCH
Package io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.utils

Class Util

java.lang.Object
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.utils.Util
public class Util extends Object
Utility class for version checks, text formatting, and platform detection.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    GAME_MAIN_VERSION
    Main version of the game (e.g., 1.x.x -> 1).
    static final int
    GAME_SUB_VERSION
    Subversion of the game (e.g., x.x.4 -> 4 or 0 if not present).
    static final int
    GAME_VERSION
    Minor version of the game (e.g., x.21.x -> 21).

  • Field Details

    • GAME_MAIN_VERSION

      public static final int GAME_MAIN_VERSION
      Main version of the game (e.g., 1.x.x -> 1).

    • GAME_VERSION

      public static final int GAME_VERSION
      Minor version of the game (e.g., x.21.x -> 21).

    • GAME_SUB_VERSION

      public static final int GAME_SUB_VERSION
      Subversion of the game (e.g., x.x.4 -> 4 or 0 if not present).

  • Constructor Details

    • Util

      public Util()

  • Method Details

    • formatText

      public static String formatText(String text)
      Formats text using MiniMessage and ChatColor. Supports both legacy color codes: normal and hex.
      Parameters:
      text - The text to format.
      Returns:
      The formatted text.

    • isVersionUpTo

      public static boolean isVersionUpTo(int mainVersion, int version)
      Checks if the game version is at least the specified version. Inclusive: isVersionUpTo(1,9) returns true for 1.9.0.
      Parameters:
      mainVersion - The main version to check (e.g., 1 for 1.9).
      version - The minor version to check (e.g., 9 for 1.9).
      Returns:
      true if the current version is greater than or equal to the specified version.

    • isVersionUpTo

      public static boolean isVersionUpTo(int mainVersion, int version, int subVersion)
      Checks if the game version is at least the specified version. Inclusive: isVersionUpTo(1,9,4) returns true for 1.9.4.
      Parameters:
      mainVersion - The main version to check.
      version - The minor version to check.
      subVersion - The subversion to check.
      Returns:
      true if the current version is greater than or equal to the specified version.

    • isVersionAfter

      public static boolean isVersionAfter(int mainVersion, int version)
      Checks if the game version is at most the specified version. Inclusive: isVersionAfter(1,9) returns true for 1.9.0.
      Parameters:
      mainVersion - The main version to check.
      version - The minor version to check.
      Returns:
      true if the current version is less than or equal to the specified version.

    • isVersionAfter

      public static boolean isVersionAfter(int mainVersion, int version, int subVersion)
      Checks if the game version is at most the specified version. Inclusive: isVersionAfter(1,9,4) returns true for 1.9.4.
      Parameters:
      mainVersion - The main version to check.
      version - The minor version to check.
      subVersion - The subversion to check.
      Returns:
      true if the current version is less than or equal to the specified version.

    • isVersionInRange

      public static boolean isVersionInRange(int mainVersionMin, int versionMin, int mainVersionMax, int versionMax)
      Checks if the game version falls within a range (inclusive).
      Parameters:
      mainVersionMin - The minimum main version.
      versionMin - The minimum minor version.
      mainVersionMax - The maximum main version.
      versionMax - The maximum minor version.
      Returns:
      true if the current version falls within the specified range.

    • isVersionInRange

      public static boolean isVersionInRange(int mainVersionMin, int versionMin, int subVersionMin, int mainVersionMax, int versionMax, int subVersionMax)
      Checks if the game version falls within a range (inclusive).
      Parameters:
      mainVersionMin - The minimum main version.
      versionMin - The minimum minor version.
      subVersionMin - The minimum subversion.
      mainVersionMax - The maximum main version.
      versionMax - The maximum minor version.
      subVersionMax - The maximum subversion.
      Returns:
      true if the current version falls within the specified range.

    • hasPaperAPI

      public static boolean hasPaperAPI()
      Checks if the Paper API is available.
      Returns:
      true if Paper API is present, false otherwise.

    • hasPurpurAPI

      public static boolean hasPurpurAPI()
      Checks if the Purpur API is available.
      Returns:
      true if Purpur API is present, false otherwise.

    • hasFoliaAPI

      public static boolean hasFoliaAPI()
      Checks if the Folia API is available.
      Returns:
      true if Folia API is present, false otherwise.
